message.content: When your beagle tilts her head, it’s like she’s trying to understand things better! Just like when you might turn your head to hear a sound more clearly or see something in a different way, your dog does the same. It helps her figure out where noises are coming from and lets her see things better, especially since her nose can sometimes be in the way. Plus, she might notice that it makes you smile and give her attention, so she does it more because she loves making you happy!
